subcodes.title: Words spoken at a banquet on 1912-11-04
subcodes.first_line: It is an excellent table for we have assembled here through the love of Baha'u'llah.... O thou kind Lord, we render thanks unto Thee that thou hast brought us from the farthest lands
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوب سفره ایست چه که بمحبت بهآءالله ما بر آن مجتمع شده ایم امشب من بسیار مسرورم که در مجلس شما هستم
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity
